modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Do we have access to Photoshop software or need to buy it?

full_description_text: So, I was wondering if we have access to Photoshop or if we gotta buy it ourselves. Like, do we already have it or what? Just trying to figure out if I need to get it on my own.
short_description: Do we have access to Photoshop software or need to buy it?
description: So, I was wondering if we have access to Photoshop or if we gotta buy it ourselves. Like, do we already have it or what? Just trying to figure out if I need to get it on my own.
